compiled_state.title: Create docs/onboarding.md with bootstrap invocation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: GREEN

Create docs/onboarding.md containing the canonical bootstrap invocation using bash <(curl -fsSL ...) form (not curl | bash). Contains <org> placeholder pending Layer 2.

Required content:
- Section: Bootstrapping a New NextJS Project
- Bootstrap invocation: bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/<org>/digital-service-orchestra/HEAD/plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh)
- Note that <org> is a placeholder; update when Layer 2 story 8356-7324 ships

TDD exemption: GREEN phase — implementing to make RED tests from dependency task f949-c432 pass. Tests test_onboarding_doc_exists and test_onboarding_doc_has_bootstrap_section were written in RED; this makes them GREEN. Criterion: GREEN implementation task (no conditional logic, pure content creation).

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: test -f docs/onboarding.md
- Verify: grep -q 'curl -fsSL' docs/onboarding.md
- Verify: ! grep -q 'curl | bash' docs/onboarding.md
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_onboarding_doc_exists
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_onboarding_doc_has_bootstrap_section
